hooks.command: command -v alcove >/dev/null 2>&1 || { if command -v brew >/dev/null 2>&1; then brew install epicsagas/tap/alcove; elif command -v cargo-binstall >/dev/null 2>&1; then cargo binstall -y alcove; elif command -v cargo >/dev/null 2>&1; then cargo install alcove; fi; }; alcove setup

SessionStart.description: Install alcove binary if missing, register MCP server

SessionEnd.description: Reap orphaned alcove stdio proxy processes
